headline: FIS Takes Two WatersTechnology Asia Awards, Validating Cloud-Native Approach to Capital Markets
summary: JACKSONVILLE, Fla., June 11, 2026--Global financial technology leader FIS® (NYSE: FIS) has been named a winner in two categories at the 2026 WatersTechnology Asia Awards. FIS took home Best Back-Office Platform for its FIS Post Trade Processing Platform and Best Reference Data Service for its FIS Market Data Analyzer. The WatersTechnology Asia Awards recognize excellence in the deployment and management of financial information and technology across Asia's capital markets community.
